_comment: THE RUIN - a companion-as-actor puzzle world, built as a 2D MAZE. The true path turns every junction (N,E,N,W,N,W,S,W - it descends SOUTH onto the Hall of Two) and 'north' dead-ends at the Threshold and Warren, so you can't beeline; the breadth is in decoy spurs off the tempting wrong turns. Four pair-operated WARDS (server-authoritative, shared): THRESHOLD slab (a buried plate the search uncovers), WARREN nook (the true gap among four the nose finds), CISTERN light (kindle the ember, carry the mote to the brazier), HALL OF TWO (two plates at once). See docs/the-ruin-narrative-and-world.md.
_regions_comment: Named AREAS for discovery + the per-region descent GLOOM. Gloom rises by PROGRESSION (not by y, since the path turns): wood->approach->entrance->threshold->gallery->warren->rockfall->cistern, then the GROVE lifts it (a daylight shaft) before paired_hall darkens for the climax; sanctum brightens (the waking). The cistern darkens further while its light-ward is unlit.
_border_comment: A dense jittered ring of old trees crowding the whole bounds, so the ruin sits in a wood and the open ground around it is sealed.

_ruin_comment: The pair-operated WARDS, server-authoritative. A ward links found+occupied -> open (latched). Coordinates re-placed for the maze; ids/relationships unchanged.

wards.hint: The slab won't budge. Maybe your companion can find what works it - try sending it to look.
Four gaps in the rubble, all alike - you can't tell which goes through. Your companion's nose can. Send it to look, and trust where it leads.
Pitch dark, and the door is sealed. Nothing here moves - but the brazier is cold and the ember is dead. This place needs LIGHT. Wake the ember, then send your companion to carry it.

This hall was built for TWO - two plates, and the great door yields only while BOTH bear weight at once. With a friend, a companion to each. Alone, jam the loose wedge onto one plate (examine it beside that plate) to hold it, then send your companion to stand the other.

_portals_comment: ruin_entry is where you arrive from the Vale (south, in the wood) and step back to leave; ruin_exit, in the sanctum beyond the great door, leads home.
